title: Coming and Going
description: Vocabulary for talking about travel, transport and journeys.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A person boarding a plane to travel abroad
topicVocabulary.meaningVi: ở nước ngoài, ra nước ngoài
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: in or to a foreign country

example.en: She's studying abroad this year.
example.vi: Năm nay cô ấy đang du học ở nước ngoài.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A hotel room used as travel accommodation
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: a place to live, stay or sleep, especially for travellers

example.en: We booked our accommodation before the trip.
example.vi: Chúng tôi đã đặt chỗ ở trước chuyến đi.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: Someone booking tickets online
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: to arrange to have a seat, room, ticket, etc. at a particular time in the future

example.en: I've booked two tickets for the concert.
example.vi: Tôi đã đặt hai vé xem hòa nhạc.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A family relaxing on a short holiday break
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: a short holiday, or a pause from work or school

example.en: We're going away for a short break this weekend.
example.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ đi nghỉ ngắn ngày vào cuối tuần này.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A cancelled flight shown on an airport departures board
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: to decide that something that was planned will not happen

example.en: Our flight was cancelled because of the storm.
example.vi: Chuyến bay của chúng tôi đã bị hủy vì bão.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: Passengers running to catch a train
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: to get on a bus, train, plane, etc. in order to travel somewhere

example.en: We need to catch the eight o'clock train.
example.vi: Chúng ta cần bắt chuyến tàu tám giờ.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A long-distance coach parked at a bus station
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: a comfortable bus that takes people on long journeys

example.en: We travelled to Paris by coach.
example.vi: Chúng tôi đã đi Paris bằng xe khách.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A hotel conveniently located near the airport
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: suitable for your purposes and needs, without causing problems

example.en: The hotel is very convenient for the airport.
example.vi: Khách sạn này rất thuận tiện để ra sân bay.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A car that has crashed into a wall
topicVocabulary.meaningVi: đâm, va chạm; vụ va chạm
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: to hit something violently causing damage; a violent accident involving a vehicle

example.en: The car crashed into a wall.
example.vi: Chiếc xe đã đâm vào tường.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A crowded beach full of people in summer
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: full of people

example.en: The beach was really crowded in summer.
example.vi: Bãi biển rất đông đúc vào mùa hè.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A large cruise ship sailing at sea
topicVocabulary.meaningVi: chuyến du lịch bằng tàu biển
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: a holiday journey on a large ship, visiting different places

example.en: They went on a cruise around the Mediterranean.
example.vi: Họ đã đi du lịch bằng tàu biển quanh Địa Trung Hải.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: Passengers waiting because of a flight delay
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: to make something happen later than planned; a period of time when something is later than expected

example.en: Our flight was delayed by two hours.
example.vi: Chuyến bay của chúng tôi bị hoãn hai tiếng.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A signpost pointing to a popular holiday destination
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: the place where someone or something is going

example.en: Bali is a popular holiday destination.
example.vi: Bali là một điểm đến du lịch nổi tiếng.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A ferry carrying passengers and vehicles across the sea
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: a boat that carries people and vehicles across a river or a narrow area of sea

example.en: We took the ferry across the channel.
example.vi: Chúng tôi đã đi phà qua eo biển.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A plane taking off for a flight
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: a journey made by air

example.en: Our flight to London leaves at noon.
example.vi: Chuyến bay của chúng tôi đến London khởi hành lúc trưa.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A traveller looking at foreign currency and a map
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: belonging to or connected with a country that is not your own

example.en: She speaks three foreign languages.
example.vi: Cô ấy nói được ba ngoại ngữ.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: Fishing boats moored in a harbour
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: an area of water next to the coast where boats and ships can shelter

example.en: The fishing boats returned to the harbour at sunset.
example.vi: Những chiếc thuyền đánh cá trở về bến cảng lúc hoàng hôn.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A traveller looking out of a train window during a long journey
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: an act of travelling from one place to another

example.en: It was a long journey by train.
example.vi: Đó là một hành trình dài bằng tàu hỏa.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: Suitcases and bags of luggage at an airport
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: the bags and suitcases that you take with you when you travel

example.en: Please don't leave your luggage unattended.
example.vi: Vui lòng không để hành lý không có người trông coi.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A café located nearby a hotel
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: not far away in distance

example.en: There's a nice café nearby.
example.vi: Có một quán cà phê đẹp ở gần đó.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A person packing clothes into a suitcase
topicVocabulary.meaningVi: đóng gói, thu xếp hành lý
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: to put things into a bag or suitcase for travelling

example.en: I still need to pack my suitcase.
example.vi: Tôi vẫn cần thu xếp hành lý vào vali.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A traveller holding their passport
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: an official document that you need to travel to another country

example.en: Don't forget to bring your passport.
example.vi: Đừng quên mang theo hộ chiếu.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: Passengers waiting on a railway platform
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: the area in a railway station where you get on or off the train

example.en: The train to Bristol leaves from platform four.
example.vi: Chuyến tàu đi Bristol khởi hành từ sân ga số bốn.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: People waiting for a bus as public transport
topicVocabulary.meaningVi: phương tiện giao thông công cộng
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: buses, trains, etc. that are available for anyone to use

example.en: It's cheaper to use public transport than to drive.
example.vi: Dùng phương tiện công cộng rẻ hơn là tự lái xe.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: Tired travellers finally reaching their hotel
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: to arrive at a place, especially after travelling

example.en: We finally reached the hotel after midnight.
example.vi: Cuối cùng chúng tôi cũng đến được khách sạn sau nửa đêm.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A beach resort with sun loungers and palm trees
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: a place where a lot of people go on holiday

example.en: We stayed at a beach resort in Thailand.
example.vi: Chúng tôi đã ở tại một khu nghỉ dưỡng bên biển ở Thái Lan.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: Souvenirs for sale at a market stall
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: something you buy to remind you of a place you have visited

example.en: I bought a souvenir from the market.
example.vi: Tôi đã mua một món quà lưu niệm ở chợ.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: Heavy traffic on a busy motorway
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: the vehicles moving along a road

example.en: There was heavy traffic on the motorway this morning.
example.vi: Sáng nay giao thông trên đường cao tốc rất đông đúc.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: A family planning a trip to the mountains
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: a journey to a place and back again, especially for a short time

example.en: We're planning a trip to the mountains.
example.vi: Chúng tôi đang lên kế hoạch cho một chuyến đi lên núi.

topicVocabulary.imageAlt: Different types of vehicles on a road
topicVocabulary.definitionEn: a machine, usually with an engine, that carries people or things, especially on roads

example.en: Cars, buses and lorries are all vehicles.
example.vi: Ô tô, xe buýt và xe tải đều là phương tiện.

phrasalVerbs.imageAlt: A woman getting into a taxi

example.en: She got into the taxi and gave the driver her address.
example.vi: Cô ấy lên taxi và đưa địa chỉ cho tài xế.

example.en: We need to get off at the next stop.
example.vi: Chúng ta cần xuống ở điểm dừng tiếp theo.

phrasalVerbs.imageAlt: A passenger getting onto a train

example.en: He got on the train just before it left.
example.vi: Anh ấy lên tàu ngay trước khi tàu chạy.

phrasalVerbs.imageAlt: A driver getting out of a car

example.en: Get out of the car and lock the doors.
example.vi: Hãy ra khỏi xe và khóa cửa lại.

phrasalVerbs.imageAlt: A couple going away for the weekend with suitcases

example.en: They went away for the weekend.
example.vi: Họ đã đi xa vào cuối tuần.

phrasalVerbs.imageAlt: A tourist going back to the hotel

example.en: We went back to the hotel to get our umbrellas.
example.vi: Chúng tôi đã quay lại khách sạn để lấy ô.

phrasalVerbs.imageAlt: A family setting off on a road trip

example.en: We set off early to avoid the traffic.
example.vi: Chúng tôi khởi hành sớm để tránh tắc đường.

phrasalVerbs.imageAlt: A plane taking off from the runway

example.en: The plane took off an hour late.
example.vi: Máy bay cất cánh trễ một tiếng.

prepositionalPhrases.imageAlt: Icons showing travel by air, sea, bus and car
prepositionalPhrases.usageEn: used to say how you travel or how something is sent, followed by the mode of transport

example.en: It's much faster to travel by air than by sea.
example.vi: Di chuyển bằng máy bay nhanh hơn nhiều so với đường biển.

prepositionalPhrases.usageEn: on a ship, plane or train

example.en: There were 200 passengers on board the plane.
example.vi: Có 200 hành khách trên máy bay.

prepositionalPhrases.imageAlt: A tourist exploring a city on foot
prepositionalPhrases.usageEn: walking, not using any form of transport

example.en: It's only ten minutes on foot from here.
example.vi: Từ đây đi bộ chỉ mất mười phút.

prepositionalPhrases.imageAlt: A family relaxing on holiday at the beach
prepositionalPhrases.usageEn: away from home, not working, for pleasure

example.en: We're going to Spain on holiday next month.
example.vi: Tháng tới chúng tôi sẽ đi nghỉ ở Tây Ban Nha.

prepositionalPhrases.usageEn: happening at the time that was planned

example.en: The train arrived on schedule.
example.vi: Tàu đến đúng giờ theo lịch trình.

prepositionalPhrases.imageAlt: A town on the coast with lovely beaches
prepositionalPhrases.usageEn: in a place next to the sea

example.en: The town is on the coast, so it has lovely beaches.
example.vi: Thị trấn nằm ven biển nên có những bãi biển đẹp.

families.imageAlt: A famous attraction that attracts many tourists

forms.meaningVi: điểm thu hút, sức hấp dẫn

families.imageAlt: A sign pointing backwards towards the way back
A traveller choosing between two destinations
A comfortable seat on a long journey
A departure board showing flight departure times
A signpost showing directions to different places
A driver driving a car on a road trip
A plane flying in the sky
A traveller with a backpack exploring a new city

adjectivePreposition.imageAlt: A hotel close to the beach

example.en: Our hotel is close to the beach.
example.vi: Khách sạn của chúng tôi gần biển.

adjectivePreposition.imageAlt: A city famous for its old harbour

example.en: The city is famous for its old harbour.
example.vi: Thành phố này nổi tiếng với bến cảng cổ.

adjectivePreposition.imageAlt: A campsite far from the nearest town

example.en: The campsite is far from the nearest town.
example.vi: Khu cắm trại ở xa thị trấn gần nhất.

example.en: We were late for our flight.
example.vi: Chúng tôi đã trễ chuyến bay.

adjectivePreposition.imageAlt: A trip suitable for young children

example.en: This trip isn't suitable for young children.
example.vi: Chuyến đi này không phù hợp với trẻ nhỏ.

verbPreposition.structure: arrive at + small place / in + city, country

example.en: We arrived at the airport two hours early.
example.vi: Chúng tôi đến sân bay sớm hai tiếng.

verbPreposition.imageAlt: A tourist asking a guide about local customs
verbPreposition.meaningVi: hỏi ai đó về điều gì

example.en: I asked the guide about the local customs.
example.vi: Tôi đã hỏi hướng dẫn viên về phong tục địa phương.

verbPreposition.imageAlt: A tourist asking for directions to the station

example.en: She asked for directions to the station.
example.vi: Cô ấy đã hỏi đường đến ga.

verbPreposition.imageAlt: Travellers looking at a map before setting off

example.en: Look at the map before we set off.
example.vi: Hãy xem bản đồ trước khi chúng ta khởi hành.

verbPreposition.imageAlt: A family preparing for a trip abroad

example.en: We need to prepare for our trip abroad.
example.vi: Chúng ta cần chuẩn bị cho chuyến đi nước ngoài.

verbPreposition.imageAlt: An airline providing passengers with free meals

example.en: The airline provided us with free meals.
example.vi: Hãng hàng không đã cung cấp cho chúng tôi bữa ăn miễn phí.

verbPreposition.imageAlt: Passengers waiting for the next ferry

example.en: We had to wait for the next ferry.
example.vi: Chúng tôi phải chờ chuyến phà tiếp theo.
